title: Age Of Magic
description: mcreator mod for magic boss from neural network
body:
# Mod by Aranirr

**Polished Syenite**:it is needed to summon the boss with the bug amulet
**Bug Amulet**: one of the components for summoning a boss
**Laser**: rapid-fire arrows
**Vex Scroll**: shoots icicles that do a lot of damage
